violations.text: Establishment is not maintaining TPHC logs for pizza slices. PIC stated they will resume practice. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Menu board was updated during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025

Working containers of oil/water/liquid ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Staff labeled during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (potato cutter) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Potato cutter was cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

Grill cold drawers were observed at an ambient temperature of 60 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit was out of service prior to inspection. Equipment to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (potato cutter and slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

Breaded chicken cutlets, gyro meat, salad ingredients, dressings and desserts were observed held at (46-60) degrees Fahrenheit in the grill drawers, salad prep unit and dessert case. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods that were out of temperature for an unknown amount of time were voluntarily disposed. Foods that were recently prepared were moved to other refrigeration to blast chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023
Oil disposal unit was observed with an accumulation of oil and soil residue on containing unit and on ground. Area to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023
Fan guards in the walk-in cooler was observed with an accumulation of dust. Left fan on condenser unit was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023
